channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NSF-supported teams advanced through the Presidential AI Challenge, with North Carolina teacher named national champion
item.description: A team backed by the U.S. National Science Foundation and sponsored by North Carolina State University won the inaugural...

item.title: Scientists found a new Alzheimerâs trigger and a drug that stops it
item.description: Researchers identified a new Alzheimerâs target and developed an experimental compound that blocks a harmful process in brain cells. In mice,...

item.title: New discovery casts doubt on Planet Nine theory
item.description: Astronomers searching for a hidden giant planet beyond Neptune face new challenges as unusual Kuiper Belt orbits suggest alternative explanations.

item.title: Podcast: Bringing quantum concepts into classrooms
item.description: Erica Carlson and Muhsin Menekse discuss their collaboration to inspire the next STEM workforce through a quantum education program.
